description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! This season, these heels work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge.Product DetailsBeaded brown thong style straps that culminate in an elasticated ankle loopSoft footbed upper stitched to the outsoleTough wedge style heelingTough sole with herringbone groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
